response.original_title: ((Elite~Help))  How do I cancel my Geek Squad membership?
response.overview: If you’re asking, “How do I cancel my Geek Squad membership?” the most direct step is to call 1»888»400⬩»4972 to speak with a live agent. Avoid long online forms or confusing menus—this number connects you to a cancellation specialist who can process your request immediately.  1»888»400⬩»4972 is your fastest route to cancel auto-renewal or end your plan entirely. Before calling, have your Best Buy account email and membership ID ready. Agents can confirm your last bill date and any refund eligibility for unused months.
